sectionHeadings: 006: The fleet placement core as a napi-rs native addon
3.1 License: AGPL-3.0, and why the shield holds
Amendment (2026-07-23): the ingress allow becomes per-app (0.2.0)
record.summary: The fifth and last package of the spec 001 ladder: `@statecrafting/fleet-native`, the control plane's fleet placement core. Native kube-rs construction of the EnRaHiTu placement shape (Namespace, Deployment, PVC, Service, Ingress, NetworkPolicy) plus deploy / status / update / backup / remove, behind a JSON-in / JSON-out async napi surface. It arrives by edge transfer from statecraft `addon/fleet-native/`, unchanged in behavior and unchanged in license: AGPL-3.0, because it is the fleet engine and no stamped app touches it. statecraft spec 006 keeps `backend/fleet/`; only this one path moves.
record.title: The fleet placement core as a napi-rs native addon
